action.reasoning: Observation: fresh workspace, no code yet. Analysis: need a fast end-to-end baseline with offline-safe predict.py and immediate eval to validate pipeline and measure runtime. Decision: implement a compact CNN encoder + GRU decoder seq2seq with attention, width-preserving image preprocessing, short 3-epoch training, local validation decoding, then submit eval.
action.command:
python train.py --epochs 3 --batch_size 24 --num_workers 4 && python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output val_pred.json && python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
pred=json.load(open('val_pred.json','r',encoding='utf-8'))['predictions']
labels={}
for line in open('/data/val/labels.txt','r',encoding='utf-8'):
    i,t=line.rstrip('\n').split('\t')
    labels[i]=t
acc=sum(int(x['latex'].strip()==labels[x['id']].strip()) for x in pred)/len(pred)
print(json.dumps({'local_val_exprate':acc,'n_preds':len(pred)}))
PY
